title: Question bank expansion targets — scoped gold lessons (waves 1–3)

questionThemes: Multi-patient prioritization (who to see first)
Delegation and assignment within PN/RPN vs RN scope
Unsafe practice recognition (delaying report, wrong task order)
Therapeutic communication during conflict over priorities
Canadian vs US: same judgment spine; watch scope language in stems
metadataSignals: Tag nclex_client_needs_category toward management/delegation when accurate
Include body_system or topic text that maps to inferClinicalSystemForRow for weak systems on the pathway

questionThemes: Infection + hypotension/tachycardia/altered mentation — first actions
Post-op and line-associated infection cues
Lactate / urine output / perfusion trends when stem includes them
NP: ED referral vs outpatient management for toxic appearance
RPN/PN: report and support; no silent waiting
metadataSignals: Use keywords for inferMedicationBuckets when antibiotics/vasopressors appear
Region_scope and exam keys aligned to pathway subscriber pool

questionThemes: Insulin: hypoglycemia before hyperglycemia, five rights, decimal errors
Anticoagulants: bleeding, neuro red flags, hold/clarify orders
Opioids: RR, sedation, SpO₂, naloxone per protocol
Canadian stems: mmol/L glucose, SI-aware reasoning
NP: risk stratification, naloxone co-prescribing concepts, renal dosing cues
metadataSignals: Explicit insulin / anticoagulant / opioid language for medication breadth metrics
Rationale length: target strong tier (≥200 words or correct_answer_explanation > 80 chars) on new items

questionThemes: Oxygen therapy and escalation (PN/RN/NP appropriate forks)
Exacerbation infection vs over-diuresis overlap in stems
Patient teaching: inhalers, pursed-lip breathing, cessation
Hyperkalemia with ECG progression — calcium/insulin/glucose/dialysis teaching per stem
Hypo/hypernatremia: symptoms, correction speed, neuro changes
Hypocalcemia tetany / prolonged QT; hypomagnesemia and torsades risk
DKA/HHNS: fluid and potassium shifts during insulin therapy
Canadian items: mmol/L sodium, potassium, glucose
NP: ACEI + spironolactone + NSAID hyperkalemia; ED referral thresholds
metadataSignals: Topic/subtopic keywords for fluids, electrolytes, renal, acid-base

questionThemes: STEMI vs NSTEMI / unstable angina prioritization and reperfusion pathways
NTG contraindications: hypotension, RV infarct, PDE-5 inhibitors, severe AS
Aspirin antiplatelet role; anticoagulant and bleeding monitoring
Atypical ACS in women, diabetes, older adults
Post-PCI access site and antiplatelet teaching
NP: chest pain cannot-miss (ACS, PE, dissection) — ED referral
metadataSignals: management_of_care for prioritization multi-patient items tied to ACS

questionThemes: FAST / acute focal deficit — EMS activation and time-last-known-well
tPA eligibility framing: BP parameters, contraindications, post-tPA neuro checks (exam-level)
ICP: Cushing triad, pupil changes, seizure precautions, positioning per order
LP contraindication when mass effect/herniation risk before imaging
Posterior circulation and stroke mimics (hypoglycemia, migraine) when stem differentiates
NP: TIA same-day workup vs reassurance; anticoagulation stroke prevention themes
metadataSignals: management_of_care for multi-patient stroke vs stable client prioritization

questionThemes: Hypovolemic/hemorrhagic vs cardiogenic vs obstructive vs distributive recognition
Septic shock: early antibiotics, fluids, vasopressor teaching per Surviving Sepsis-style stems
Anaphylaxis: epinephrine first, airway, repeat dosing per protocol
Vasopressor extravasation and infusion safety
Canadian: mmol/L lactate, MAP in mmHg, massive transfusion / reaction monitoring
NP: clinic triage — who needs EMS for hypotension or bleeding
metadataSignals: Tag shock topic and cardio/perfusion language for inferClinicalSystemForRow
Include vasopressor/antibiotic cues for medication breadth when items add drugs

questionThemes: REx-PN scope: medication administration, IV authority, controlled acts — clarify vs guess
SBAR and interprofessional handoff; unsafe assignment escalation
Fraudulent documentation, abuse/neglect reporting, infection control leadership within role
US RN / CA RN: delegation to LPN/RPN, five rights of delegation, unstable client assignment
NP: clear orders and parameters for practical nursing staff; collaborative agreement boundaries
metadataSignals: delegation topic slug and management_of_care client-need tagging
Region_scope CA for RPN-heavy stems; US parallels for LPN comparison items
